name: Jinan High-tech Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinan High-tech Development Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in real estate, mining, finance, venture capital, and other businesses in China. The company is involved in the development of residential, commercial, tourism, and education real estate properties. It also engages in prospecting, mining, and processing of a gold source tenement with a span of approximately 120 kilometers. In addition, the company is involved in finance activities; and venture capital business, including investment in primary market, equity, secondary market, and debt and non-performing asset disposition activities. Jinan High-tech Development Co., Ltd. is based in Jinan, China.
